scripts.build: slidev build kinto-pitch.md --base /kinto-pitch/ --out dist/kinto-pitch && slidev build random-pitch.md --base /portfolio/ --out dist/portfolio && slidev build rspai_week2.md --base /rspai-week2/ --out dist/rspai-week2 && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('landing.html','dist/index.html'); fs.copyFileSync('public/kinto-pitch.pdf','dist/kinto-pitch/kinto-pitch.pdf'); ['rr-logo.png','rr-network.png','rr-deepdive.png'].forEach(f=>{try{fs.copyFileSync('public/'+f,'dist/rspai-week2/'+f);}catch(e){}});"
